endpoints.response_shape: Flat object: { port: <int>, pury: <int>, seyon: <int>, gare1: <int>, gare2: <int>, gare: <int> } — each value is free spaces for that parking

fields.port: free spaces at Parking du Port
fields.seyon: free spaces at Parking Place du Seyon
fields.gare1: free spaces at Parking de la Gare, level 1
fields.gare2: free spaces at Parking de la Gare, level 2
fields.gare: free spaces at Parking de la Gare (gare1 + gare2 combined; convenience field)

endpoints.notes: Endpoint returns ONLY free spaces — capacities are not in the JSON, they are in the page markup. Polled by the website every ~30 seconds.

parkings.name: Parking de la Gare
parkings.notes: Feed splits this parking into two levels: "gare1" (free spaces level 1) and "gare2" (free spaces level 2). The "gare" field is their sum.
